series_metadata.series_title: Federation of State Medical Board Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Information submitted to the Federation of State Medical Boards regarding disciplinary actions against physicians, and includes a summary of the disciplinary actions, pentalties, and biographical data pertaining to licensees.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic version for 75 years; then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
